description_long: This object is a set of four industrial-style storage cabinets or shelving units, each featuring a grid of small, open-fronted cubby compartments. The units are predominantly a deep red color on the front-facing surfaces, with black or dark-colored frames and sides, giving them a robust and utilitarian appearance. The cubbies are arranged in a regular, rectangular pattern, suggesting use for organizing small items, tools, or parts, commonly found in workshops, garages, or maintenance areas. The backs and sides of the units are solid and unadorned, emphasizing their functional design. The overall construction appears to be metal, likely steel, for durability and strength, with a powder-coated or painted finish. The units are freestanding and could be placed side by side or separately in an urban environment for accessible storage.
description: A set of four industrial red and black metal shelving units with multiple open cubby compartments, designed for organized storage in urban or workshop settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open cubby compartments and the grid layout of the shelving units.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow depth and solid black side panels of the units.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black backs and red top edges, with no visible compartments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and solid construction.
